top_tweets.text: As AI agents accelerate coding, what is the future of software engineering? Some trends are clear, such as the Product Management Bottleneck, referring to the idea that we are more constrained by deciding what to build rather than the actual building. But many implications, like
top_tweets.author: AndrewYNg
top_tweets.name: Andrew Ng
top_tweets.summary_zh: 隨著 AI 加速編碼效率，產品管理成為新瓶頸——我們受限的不再是技術實現，而是決定要做什麼；PM 和設計師需要重新思考在 AI 時代的角色定位。

top_tweets.text:
Anyone who thinks "AI = easy mode" honestly just sounds dumb and out of touch.

For context, I’ve been doing product design for 20+ years, including giant brands like Febreze, Swiffer, and Abercrombie with multi-continent supply chains etc. 

I can tell you that AI is by FAR the
top_tweets.author: thefinnmckenty
top_tweets.name: Finn McKenty
top_tweets.summary_zh: 20+ 年資深產品設計師指出 AI 遠非易用模式，需要深度領域知識才能有效應用，盲目迷信 AI 會導致決策失誤。

top_tweets.text:
Farmer doesn't even realize that this is really a right to repair issue. The placement of the bearing is a design choice that takes away the right to repair. This is a conscious decision by a company to make their product unrepairable.

This is not a "quality" issue. It is a
top_tweets.author: longstoryfarms
top_tweets.name: Long Story Farms, LLC
top_tweets.summary_zh: 產品設計中的維修權問題本質是設計選擇，企業有意透過零件配置限制消費者自行維修的能力，這是商業策略而非品質問題。

top_tweets.text:
This is really accurate. 

As much as we all want to drink the vibe coding kool-aid, the reality is that 90%+ of all code in a company is maintaining and migrating existing stuff that is complicated and messy. You can definitely vibe code the remaining 10% but unless there is a
top_tweets.author: chamath
top_tweets.name: Chamath Palihapitiya
top_tweets.summary_zh: 企業 90% 以上的程式碼工作是維護和遷移既有複雜系統，而非新開發；Vibe coding 只適用於少數新功能，難以應對實務複雜性。

top_tweets.text:
Vibe coding was a fun trend.

Now it is a massive enterprise risk.

You cannot let 50 people build shadow IT without the guardrails of 
@superblocks
top_tweets.author: KateMillerGems
top_tweets.name: Kate Miller
top_tweets.summary_zh: Vibe coding 如今成為企業風險，無管制的影子 IT 專案會削弱組織治理能力，需要建立適當的護欄和審查機制。

top_tweets.text:
Claude Code just got it's biggest upgrade yet

The desktop app is now by far the best way to be building apps with AI, even better than the CLI

In this video I cover every single change and a few workflows for vibe coding faster than ever, even if you've never coded before: https://t.co/1V1GiKllT8
top_tweets.author: AlexFinn
top_tweets.name: Alex Finn
top_tweets.summary_zh: Claude Code 桌面應用成為 AI 輔助開發的最佳工具，支援無程式碼背景的使用者快速迭代，改變了人機協作的工作流程。

top_tweets.text:
New course: Spec-Driven Development with Coding Agents, built in partnership with @jetbrains, and taught by @paulweveritt.

Vibe coding is fast, but often produces code that doesn't match what you asked for. This short course teaches you spec-driven development: write a detailed https://t.co/M9zaNg2aTb

top_tweets.name: Andrew Ng
top_tweets.summary_zh: 規格驅動開發課程強調詳細需求定義的重要性，對治療 Vibe coding 常見的「輸出不符預期」問題有幫助。

top_tweets.author: foryoonchae
top_tweets.name: wingyun
top_tweets.summary_zh: 設計過程中隱藏品牌符號（如設計師名字）是細節考量，但從草稿到最終版本過程中遺漏細節會影響設計完整性與傳達效果。

top_tweets.text:
Being a solo-founder:

- 10% coding
- 15% marketing
- 5% operations
- 5% management
- 1% mental control
- 6% UX/UI
- 18% customer support
- 12% sales
- 10% debugging
- 8% product strategy
- 5% finance
- 5% “wtf isn’t this working” existential crisis
top_tweets.author: pmitu
top_tweets.name: Paul Mit
top_tweets.summary_zh: 獨立創業者需要跨越十數個領域，其中產品策略、UX/UI 與客戶支援佔比最重，突顯全棧能力的必要性。

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
claude_filter_rules: 排除純廣告、招聘文（有洞見的 JD 除外）
排除與產品設計/PM 無關（crypto、體育、政治等）
排除 meme/搞笑但無內容
偏好有觀點的原創內容
